output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, math, os, sys, textwrap, itertools, collections, statistics

# Load the files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_db = json.load(f)
len(quran_db), type(quran_db)[:0]

import re

# Arabic diacritics regex pattern (harakat + tatweel)
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(
    r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED\u0640]"
)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = str(s)
    # Remove diacritics and tatweel
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # Normalize hamza forms: أإآؤئ to ا و ي maybe unify to base forms
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ء","")
    # Normalize alef maqsura to ya
    s = s.replace("ى","ي")
    # Normalize taa marbuta to ha? we can keep "ة" as "ه" sometimes; for search unify to "ه" maybe; 
    # But in many quranic words "مغفرة" vs "مغفره" not typical. We'll convert to ه to avoid mismatches.
    s = s.replace("ة","ه")
    # Remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # Collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

def tokenize(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s).split()

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # Using DP for small texts
    A, B = a, b
    n, m = len(A), len(B)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if A[i-1] == B[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_metrics(candidate_text, span_text):
    # token-based F1 and LCS normalized
    cand_norm = normalize_arabic(candidate_text)
    span_norm = normalize_arabic(span_text)
    # character LCS normalized by max length
    lcs = lcs_length(cand_norm, span_norm)
    lcs_norm_max = lcs / max(1, max(len(cand_norm), len(span_norm)))
    lcs_norm_min = lcs / max(1, min(len(cand_norm), len(span_norm)))
    # token F1
    cand_tokens = cand_norm.split()
    span_tokens = span_norm.split()
    cand_counts = collections.Counter(cand_tokens)
    span_counts = collections.Counter(span_tokens)
    common = sum((cand_counts & span_counts).values())
    precision = common / max(1, len(cand_tokens))
    recall = common / max(1, len(span_tokens))
    if precision+recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return {
        "lcs_norm_max": lcs_norm_max,
        "lcs_norm_min": lcs_norm_min,
        "precision": precision,
        "recall": recall,
        "f1": f1,
        "common_tokens": common,
        "cand_len": len(cand_tokens),
        "span_len": len(span_tokens),
    }

# Provided strings
orig_span = "الرِجَالُ قَوَّامُونَ عَلَى النِسَاءِ بِمَا فَضَّلَ اللَّهُ بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَى بَعْضٍ وَبِمَا أَنفَقُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ فَالصَالِحَاتُ قَانِتَاتٌ حَافِظَاتٌ لِلغَيْبِ وَالرَاضِعاتُ حَافِظَاتٌ فُرُجَاعٌ"
snippet = "الرِجَالُ ... فُرُجَاعٌ"

normalize_arabic(orig_span), tokenize(orig_span)[:10], normalize_arabic(snippet)[:80]

candidates = []
for rec in quran_db:
    text = rec['ayah_text']
    ntext = normalize_arabic(text)
    if "الرجال قوامون علي النسا" in ntext or "الرجال قوامون" in ntext:
        candidates.append(rec)
len(candidates), [(c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id'], c['surah_name'], c['ayah_text'][:80]) for c in candidates[:5]]

cand = candidates[0]
metrics = similarity_metrics(cand['ayah_text'], orig_span)
metrics

content.text: {"correction":"الرِّجَالُ قَوَّامُونَ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ بِمَا فَضَّلَ اللَّهُ بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ وَبِمَا أَنْفَقُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ ۚ فَالصَّالِحَاتُ قَانِتَاتٌ حَافِظَاتٌ لِلْغَيْبِ بِمَا حَفِظَ اللَّهُ ۚ وَاللَّاتِي تَخَافُونَ نُشُوزَهُنَّ فَعِظُوهُنَّ وَاهْجُرُوهُنَّ فِي الْمَضَاجِعِ وَاضْرِبُوهُنَّ ۖ فَإِنْ أَطَعْنَكُمْ فَلَا تَبْغُوا عَلَيْهِنَّ سَبِيلًا ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيًّا كَبِيرًا"}
